title: Structure Editor (Component)
text: Structure Editor (Component) Use the Structure Editor in to define the component's data structure. You can insert modeled entities and fields, create non-database entities and fields, control the order of data processing by the hierarchical structure you define. For more information, see Component Data Structure . Figure 1. Component Structure Editor How to Define the Component Structure Resize Columns Using the Uniface IDE Working with Development Objects Related Links Component Data Structure Every component has a data structure that defines its component entities and fields, and the path required to access the data. The data structure affects the validation rules for data I/O, such as enforcing referential integrity constraints. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
